title: Stranger Things
description:
It's Stranger Things... But in Minecraft?!?!?
Created By: Swirly
body:
![Swirly's Stranger Things](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58d54e128699b694919d7e668de2727b89558968.png)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ifEHoDvjLaM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

> *"Something is coming… something hungry for blood."*

Bring The Upside Down and it's inhabitants directly into your Minecraft world. This mod delivers an atmospheric experience built around the lore and creatures from the show Stranger Things.
![The Upside Down stacked upon the overworld.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/859f7b64d9eaf43e58d4607b652761b99ec4679e.png)

---

##  The Awakening

The Upside Down doesn't open on its own. The world starts as regular vanilla Minecraft. But when you interact with the **sensory deprivation tank** and encounter the Demogorgon lurking within, everything changes.

**Attacking it triggers The Awakening.** From that moment on, the Upside Down is alive.

---

## Creatures from the Upside Down

| Creature | Description |
|---|---|
| **Demogorgon** | The apex predator of the Upside Down. Highly intelligent, incredibly aggressive. |
| **Demodog** | Pack hunters. They coordinate attacks and grow increasingly dangerous in numbers. |
| **Demobat** | Swarming aerial threats that spawn in hordes. |
| **Vecna** | The big bad. Haunts cursed players; stalking them, appearing and vanishing, getting deeper into your mind before it's too late... |

---

## Vecna's Curse

Once the world awakens, Vecna may choose a victim. 

- **Nightmare Visions** trigger randomly throughout the day - hallucination mobs, spider swarms, visions of the Upside Down, and more.

The only way out? **Find your music.** Use the **Walkman** and Kate Bush's *Running Up That Hill* to fight back.

---

## Eleven's Powers

Wield the power of the most powerful girl in the world:

- **Telekinesis** — Levitate entities, hold them suspended in the air, then fling or blast them away with a flick of your mouse. The harder the flick, the farther they fly.
- **Rift Manipulation** — Focus your powers for 3 seconds to **tear open a Rift** to the Upside Down through any wall or floor. Focus again to seal it.
- **Power Mode** — Toggle enhanced power for extreme throws
- **Cost** — Using your powers drains hunger. Push past starvation and it costs you health.

---

## The Upside Down Dimension

A mirrorworld version of the Overworld.

- **Upside Down Dirt & Grass** with unique textures.
- **Rifts** randomly tear open near players after The Awakening, connecting your world to the Upside Down
- **Flickering lights** - Upside Down interference causes nearby torches and lanterns to flicker
- Existing worlds can be **synchronized** with a one-time world scan when you first install the mod

---

## Items

-  **Music Disc: Running Up That Hill** (Kate Bush) - Your salvation against Vecna's curse. Plays in a Jukebox.
-  **Walkman** - Find it in the abyss. Play it during Vecna's curse to escape.
-  **Three Musketeers Bar** - The best snack item.
- **Flamethrower** - It's in the name.

---

## Server-Friendly Design

- All behavior **gates behind The Awakening** - vanilla by default until triggered
- Full **multiplayer support**
- **Extensive config** - Tune Vecna curse timing, rift frequencies, stalker behavior, and more via `/strangerthingsconfig`
- **[Immersive Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-portals) optional** — Rifts work with full visual portals if installed, or use built-in fallback entities without it

---

## Requirements

- **Minecraft:** 1.21.x
- **Mod Loader:** Fabric
- **Required:** [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- **Optional:** [Immersive Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-portals) (enhanced rift visuals)
